summary: Iteration 61: Approval Comments and Healing Abutment Array Features - 21/21 tests PASSED (100%). All features verified: (1) ApprovalAction model accepts optional 'comment' field, (2) Phase 1-4 approval endpoints save comments as phase{N}_supervisor_notes or phase{N}_incharge_notes based on approver role, (3) healing_abutment_cuff_height accepts both array of strings (per-implant) and single string (backward compatibility), (4) Procedure detail includes created_by_role field for student-created and incharge-created cases.
critical_code_review_comments: ApprovalAction model correctly includes optional 'comment' field with max_length=2000
Phase 1 approval saves comment as phase1_supervisor_notes or phase1_incharge_notes based on approver role
Phase 2 approval saves comment as phase2_supervisor_notes or phase2_incharge_notes based on approver role
Phase 3 (Stage 2 Surgical) approval saves comment as phase3_supervisor_notes or phase3_incharge_notes
Phase 4 Step 1 (Prosthetic) approval saves comment as phase4_step1_supervisor_notes or phase4_step1_incharge_notes
Phase 4 Step 2 (Final Delivery) approval saves comment as phase4_step2_supervisor_notes or phase4_step2_incharge_notes
healing_abutment_cuff_height field accepts Any type (string or array) for per-implant values
healing_abutment_cuff_height is stored inside phase2_data object in the response
Procedure detail includes created_by_role field ('student' or 'implant_incharge')

Full workflow tested: Create → Save implant plan → Request Phase 1 → Approve with comment → Submit Phase 2 with array healing abutment → Approve Phase 2 with comment → Phase 3 → Phase 4 Step 1 → Phase 4 Step 2 → Completed
seed_data_creation: Test procedures created with TEST_ prefix during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All approval comment features verified. Key endpoints: (1) POST /api/procedures/{id}/approve handles Phase 1 and Phase 2 approvals based on status, (2) POST /api/procedures/{id}/stage2/surgical/approve for Phase 3, (3) POST /api/procedures/{id}/stage2/prosthetic/approve for Phase 4 Step 1, (4) POST /api/procedures/{id}/stage2/prosthetic/step2/approve for Phase 4 Step 2. Submit endpoints: /submit-phase2, /stage2/surgical, /stage2/prosthetic, /stage2/prosthetic/step2 (no /submit suffix). healing_abutment_cuff_height is stored inside phase2_data object.

tested_endpoints.GET /api/users: 200 - Returns list of users with IDs
tested_endpoints.POST /api/procedures/{id}/submit-phase2: 200 - Saves healing_abutment_cuff_height (array or string) in phase2_data
